description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored concrete or stucco, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The house features multiple outdoor spaces, including a rooftop terrace with greenery and a small pool, as well as a ground-level garden and a balcony with potted plants. A covered carport is integrated into the front of the house, providing sheltered parking. The landscaping includes several mature trees and shrubs, adding natural elements to the otherwise minimalist design. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing open spaces, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and integrated carport, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, balcony with plants, and rooftop terrace with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat facade, rooftop pool, and expansive lawn area to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard lawn, large windows, and rooftop terrace with a pool and tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with symmetrical window arrangement, rooftop terrace, and lush landscaping on both sides.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door under a covered carport, with minimal steps and no decorative columns or porch.
